programmes.show_description: Revitalise your outdoor space with Karcher. Discover powerful tools and tips for a spring garden refresh, making maintenance easy and enjoyable.
Find a range of year round practical home solutions from homewares and cleaning to electronics and DIY home improvement tools. This show will bring you the products you need to enhance your home.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!

Discover your new favourite bag from Kipling and spread the cost in four interest-free instalments too! From clever cross-bodies to terrific totes, find your next bag on offer right here.
Snap up the best offers at QVC before they're gone! We've got great savings on fashion, beauty, home and more, including items that won't be around for long.
Get outside and make a fresh start on your garden this new year. Plan for the season ahead and start ticking those jobs off your list!
Discover beautiful plants and all the garden essentials you need, from You Garden.
Specialising in mature plants for instant impact, Plants2Gardens offer a huge array of vibrant, colourful blooms to help transform your outdoor space and bring your garden to life.
Join us for an hour of fantastic DIY and gardening items at great value prices - perfect for all projects big and small.
